TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeys
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max(sal) as sal_max, min(sal) as sal_min, avg(sal) sal_avg, any_value(sal) as sal_val from emp group by sal, deptno

LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], SAL_MAX=[$2], SAL_MIN=[$3], SAL_AVG=[$4], SAL_VAL=[$5]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], SAL_MAX=[MAX($0)], SAL_MIN=[MIN($0)], SAL_AVG=[AVG($0)], SAL_VAL=[ANY_VALUE($0)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], SAL_MAX=[$2], SAL_MIN=[$3], SAL_AVG=[$4], SAL_VAL=[$5]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], DEPTNO=[$1], SAL_MAX=[$0], SAL_MIN=[$0], SAL_AVG=[$0], SAL_VAL=[$0]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysBinaryExpression
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max(sal * 2) as max_double from emp group by sal, deptno
LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_DOUBLE=[$2]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], MAX_DOUBLE=[MAX($2)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[*($5, 2)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_DOUBLE=[$2]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], DEPTNO=[$1], MAX_DOUBLE=[*($0, 2)]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[*($5, 2)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysDeterministicExpression
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max(sal + 1) as max_plus from emp group by sal, deptno
LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_PLUS=[$2]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], MAX_PLUS=[MAX($2)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[+($5, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_PLUS=[$2]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], DEPTNO=[$1], MAX_PLUS=[+($0, 1)]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[+($5, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysMultipleGroupKeys
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max(sal + deptno) as max_sum from emp group by sal, deptno
LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_SUM=[$2]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], MAX_SUM=[MAX($2)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[+($5, $7)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_SUM=[$2]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], DEPTNO=[$1], MAX_SUM=[+($0, $1)]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[+($5, $7)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysNestedExpression
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max((sal + 1) * 2) as max_expr from emp group by sal, deptno

LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_EXPR=[$2]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], MAX_EXPR=[MAX($2)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[*(+($5, 1), 2)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_EXPR=[$2]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], DEPTNO=[$1], MAX_EXPR=[*(+($0, 1), 2)]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[*(+($5, 1), 2)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysNoChange
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max(comm) as comm_max from emp group by sal, deptno
LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], COMM_MAX=[$2]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], COMM_MAX=[MAX($2)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], COMM=[$6]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysNullExpression
TestCase.Resource: select comm, max(comm + 1) as max_plus from empnullables group by comm
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], MAX_PLUS=[MAX($1)]) LogicalProject(COMM=[$6], $f1=[+($6, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMPNULLABLES]])
LogicalProject(COMM=[$0], MAX_PLUS=[+($0, 1)]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}]) LogicalProject(COMM=[$6], $f1=[+($6, 1)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMPNULLABLES]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysNullGroupKey
TestCase.Resource: select comm, max(comm) as comm_max from empnullables group by comm
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], COMM_MAX=[MAX($0)]) LogicalProject(COMM=[$6]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMPNULLABLES]])
LogicalProject(COMM=[$0], COMM_MAX=[$0]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}]) LogicalProject(COMM=[$6]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMPNULLABLES]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysPartial
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max(sal) as sal_max, sum(comm) as comm_sum from emp group by sal, deptno

LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], SAL_MAX=[$2], COMM_SUM=[$3]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], SAL_MAX=[MAX($0)], COMM_SUM=[SUM($2)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], COMM=[$6]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], SAL_MAX=[$2], COMM_SUM=[$3]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], DEPTNO=[$1], SAL_MAX=[$0], COMM_SUM=[$2]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], COMM_SUM=[SUM($2)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], COMM=[$6]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysUnaryMinus
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max(-sal) as max_neg from emp group by sal, deptno
LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_NEG=[$2]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], MAX_NEG=[MAX($2)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[-($5)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_NEG=[$2]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], DEPTNO=[$1], MAX_NEG=[-($0)]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[-($5)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysWithCastNarrower
TestCase.Resource: select cast(sal as smallint) as sal_small, max(sal) as sal_max from emp group by sal
LogicalProject(SAL_SMALL=[CAST($0):SMALLINT NOT NULL], SAL_MAX=[$1]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], SAL_MAX=[MAX($0)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalProject(SAL_SMALL=[CAST($0):SMALLINT NOT NULL], SAL_MAX=[$1]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], SAL_MAX=[$0]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionOfGroupByKeysWithCastWider
TestCase.Resource: select cast(sal as bigint) as sal_big, max(sal) as sal_max from emp group by sal
LogicalProject(SAL_BIG=[CAST($0):BIGINT NOT NULL], SAL_MAX=[$1]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], SAL_MAX=[MAX($0)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalProject(SAL_BIG=[CAST($0):BIGINT NOT NULL], SAL_MAX=[$1]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], SAL_MAX=[$0]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionWithMixedColumnsNoOptimization
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max(sal + comm) as max_sum from emp group by sal, deptno
LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_SUM=[$2]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], MAX_SUM=[MAX($2)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[+($5, $6)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionWithMixedGroupByColumnsNoOptimization
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max(sal + empno) as max_sum from emp group by sal, deptno
LogicalProject(SAL=[$0], MAX_SUM=[$2]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], MAX_SUM=[MAX($2)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], DEPTNO=[$7], $f2=[+($5, $0)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testAggregateFunctionWithNonGroupByColumnNoOptimization
TestCase.Resource: select sal, max(comm) as comm_max from emp group by sal
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], COMM_MAX=[MAX($1)]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], COMM=[$6]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
